raw_consumer_statement: I closed a credit card that was in my name in XXXX and have not had this card or statements since that time. I received a divorce in XX/XX/XXXX, after moving in XXXX of XXXX to a different state. My ex filed bankruptcy in her state in XXXX. After being bankrupt, the card that had been closed started to appear on my credit report and I disputed having a debt of {$25000.00} on this card through the credit report group XXXX. I also found the credit card company 's name and phone number on XXXX. I contacted them to stop the charges and the card and remove this debt from my name since I have no affiliation with the card, the state where the charges were being made or connection to the person who is using the card. This credit card company shows they closed the account and my credit score showed no deebt for about XXXX  months. This month the debt came back on my credit report for this closed acoount and it is now at {$26000.00}. I do not know what I can do to remove this debt from my name so that the person responsible for the debt ( my EX ) will have this debt only in their name and account.
